comment: 62yo nulliparous postmenopausal woman, late menopause at 56, 8 years combined HRT, no current cancer. Multi-factor reproductive cancer risk. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = risk stratification (Gail/BCSC/Tyrer-Cuzick) + HRT minimization + tamoxifen chemoprevention discussion if high-risk + screening adherence; alternative = USPSTF screening adherence + brief intervention.
